format.description: The file format of the resulting file.

name.description: The name of the file operation, derived from the collection name, document title, or file name.

state.description: The state of the file operation.

error.description: An error message if the file operation failed.

size.description: The size of the resulting file in bytes. Returned as a string as the value may exceed the safe integer range.

collectionId.description: Identifier for the associated collection, if the file operation is scoped to a single collection.

documentId.description: Identifier for the associated document, if the file operation is scoped to a single document.

createdAt.description: The date and time that this object was created

updatedAt.description: The date and time that this object was last changed
